Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joel Adler and Roger Ritter for plaintiff and moving party Morrison & Foerster LLP.
Gene Elliot for defendant and opposing party Covalent Patners, LLC and Beach Laboratories LLC.
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's request for a continuance is denied. Plaintiff's application for right to attach order, writ of attachment and temporary protective order is granted in the amount of $398, 593. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For A Temporary Protective Order (Related To Writ Of Attachment)
Off Calendar Apr-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Rogger T. Ritter for plaintiff and moving party Morrison & Foerster LLP.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Morrison & Foerster's ex parte application for a temporary protective order is granted. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
